title: Mystical Augmeculture
body:
**A small addon to Mystical Agriculture expanding Augment compatibility** ![Showing Augments working on Scythe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FwBaopwc/images/e66191372021fbf6a78e2cd5daf3153ffcf69ed6.png) **Without this addon, the Scythe would not be capable of applying the augments of Strength and Attack AOE**
What that means: - Strength Augments can be applied to melee weapons in general (scythes, sickles, axes), not just the sword. - Attack AOE Augments can be applied to melee weapons in general (scythes, sickles, axes), not just the sword. - Speed Augments can also be applied to boots. - Slowness Resistance Augments also can be applied to boots. - Hunger Resistance Augments can also be applied to non-chestplate armor pieces. - Flight Augments can also be applied to boots and leggings, not just the chestplate.
